query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS security_score_history (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  score INT NOT NULL,
  deviceCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  opsecCompleted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  opsecTotal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  openIncidents INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  activeThreats INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  recordedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS security_reports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  reportType ENUM('weekly', 'monthly', 'incident', 'audit', 'custom') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'custom',
  content LONGTEXT,
  summary TEXT,
  score INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'final') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
